description_long: This is a large, modern fire truck painted in a vivid red color with black and metallic silver accents. The vehicle features a boxy cab at the front with large windows and side mirrors, and a long rear compartment with multiple horizontal panel doors, likely for equipment storage. A prominent ladder is mounted on the roof, running nearly the full length of the vehicle, and there are visible emergency lights on the roof. The wheels are robust and black, designed for heavy-duty urban use. The sides of the truck display ribbed metallic panels, and the rear has additional grilles and access points. The overall design is utilitarian, optimized for rapid response and equipment accessibility in emergency situations.
description: A large red fire truck with a boxy cab, roof-mounted ladder, emergency lights, and multiple metallic storage panels along the sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cab with large windows, black bumper, and roof-mounted emergency lights.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the truck, including the ladder on the roof, multiple storage panels, and three visible wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back grille, rear bumper, and the end of the roof ladder.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the cab, ladder, and storage panels from the other side.
